description_long: This is a large, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle resembling a military tank, featuring a low-profile turret and a long main cannon extending from the front. The hull is robust, with thick, sloped armor plating covering the entire body, and the vehicle rides on wide, rugged tracks suitable for traversing rough terrain. On the turret, there are visible mounts for secondary armaments, including a machine gun and additional equipment. The rear of the vehicle shows complex mechanical components, likely part of a mine-clearing or engineering apparatus, with articulated arms and rotary devices. The exterior is finished in a dark, matte color, providing a subdued appearance with minimal reflectivity. No visible military insignia or markings are present, and the vehicle is designed for both protection and offensive capability in urban or battlefield environments.
description: A large, dark, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a long cannon, secondary weapon mounts, and a complex rear engineering apparatus.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide tracks, sloped frontal armor, and the prominent main cannon with attached engineering arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannon, the turret-mounted machine gun, and the full extent of the rear engineering device.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the mechanical engineering apparatus, dual exhausts, and the armored back plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, turret, and engineering equipment in profile.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof, and two articulated engineering arms at the front hull.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating; turret and hull both heavily armored with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green paint with a matte finish; no visible camouflage pattern.
